events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incredible Mick Jagger. What's your top Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV launched, playing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' first. The irony isn't lost on us, is it? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in the UK on August 29, 1994, becoming an instant Britpop classic.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Remembering the raw energy of Oasis' debut, 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your go-to track from this Britpop landmark?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance still gives you chills?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on this day in 1977. His legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, a hugely influential rapper, died on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in Las Vegas. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose profound impact on music and culture remains undeniable. His voice still resonates today.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The Fab Four's 'Abbey Road' hit shelves 57 years ago. Still crossing that road in our minds! What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and songwriting continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger after all these years.

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine UK single reissued (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic song 'Imagine' was reissued as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975. The original single was released in the US in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' a world without this song. John Lennon's timeless anthem for peace was reissued in the UK this month in 1975.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, making 1,000 songs portable and revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember when 1,000 songs in your pocket felt like magic? It's been 25 years since Apple introduced the original iPod.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, commemorating the world premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and which theme song is the ultimate 007 anthem?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940. He passed away in 1980.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy icon John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?
